ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the building_types table */,
  "primary_property_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the primary_property_types table */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the building */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the building is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the building is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the building */,
  "tax_parcel_identification_number" TEXT /* Tax parcel identification number */,
  "council_district_code" INTEGER /* Council district code */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the building is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the building */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the building */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the building was built */,
  "number_of_buildings" INTEGER /* Number of buildings in the complex */,
  "number_of_floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the building */,
  "occupancy_status" TEXT /* Occupancy status of the building */,
  "gross_floor_area" REAL /* Gross floor area of the building */,
  "energy_systems" TEXT /* Energy systems used in the building */,
  "energy_systems_description" TEXT /* Description of the energy systems used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_building_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_type_id") REFERENCES building_types ("building_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_primary_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_property_type_id") REFERENCES primary_property_types ("primary_property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "energy_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy data entry */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the data belongs to */,
  "data_year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "site_eui" REAL /* Site energy use intensity (kBtu/sf) */,
  "site_eui_wn" REAL /* Site energy use intensity (kBtu/sf) without weather normalization */,
  "source_eui" REAL /* Source energy use intensity (kBtu/sf) */,
  "source_eui_wn" REAL /* Source energy use intensity (kBtu/sf) without weather normalization */,
  "steam_use" REAL /* Steam use (kBtu) */,
  "electricity" REAL /* Electricity consumption (kWh) */,
  "electricity_kbtu" REAL /* Electricity consumption (kBtu) */,
  "natural_gas" REAL /* Natural gas consumption (therms) */,
  "natural_gas_kbtu" REAL /* Natural gas consumption (kBtu) */,
  "default_data" INTEGER /* Default data flag */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments */,
  "energy_source" TEXT /* Source of the energy consumed */,
  "energy_generation" TEXT /* On-site energy generation */,
  "energy_storage" TEXT /* Energy storage systems used */,
  "energy_efficiency_measures" TEXT /* Energy efficiency measures implemented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the certification belongs to */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification (e.g., ENERGY STAR) */,
  "certification_year" INTEGER /* Year the certification was awarded */,
  "certification_score" REAL /* Score achieved by the building */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Level of certification achieved */,
  "certification_validity" TEXT /* Validity period of the certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_certifications_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_types" (
  "building_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building type */,
  "building_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the building type (e.g., NonResidential) */,
  "building_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the building type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "primary_property_types" (
  "primary_property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each primary property type */,
  "primary_property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary property type (e.g., Hotel) */,
  "primary_property_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the primary property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("primary_property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., building owner, energy auditor) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_status" (
  "compliance_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance status entry */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the compliance status belongs to */,
  "compliance_year" INTEGER /* Year the compliance status was determined */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status (e.g., Compliant, Non-Compliant) */,
  "compliance_requirement" TEXT /* Compliance requirement for the building */,
  "compliance_status_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the compliance status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_status_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outliers" (
  "outlier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlier entry */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the outlier belongs to */,
  "data_year" INTEGER /* Year the outlier was detected */,
  "outlier_type" TEXT /* Type of outlier (e.g., high energy consumption) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes on the outlier */,
  "outlier_detection_method" TEXT /* Method used to detect the outlier */,
  "outlier_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the outlier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outliers_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark */,
  "benchmark_value" REAL /* Value of the benchmark */,
  "benchmark_description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark */,
  "benchmark_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the benchmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id")
)
